info.title: In2 Public API
info.description:
Tenant-facing REST API for integrating with the In2 platform.

> [!WARNING]
> **Plan requirement:** This API is available on the **Advanced**, **Pro**, and **Enterprise** plans only. Businesses on the **Starter** plan do not have access to the Public API.

All endpoints require a Bearer token. Use `POST /api/v1/token` to exchange your API key for a short-lived JWT, then pass the returned `accessToken` as the Bearer token on every request. Using the raw API key directly on these endpoints is not recommended.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Exchange an API key for a short-lived access token and rotate it via refresh token.

tags.name: Leads
tags.description: Read lead reference data: statuses, capture-form configuration and capture-form links.

tags.name: Leads
tags.description: Create, read, update, search, convert and annotate sales leads, and read lead statuses and capture-form configuration.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Create, read, search and merge customer records, and manage their notes and memberships.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Create, search, retrieve and annotate customer profiles.

tags.name: Customer Memberships
tags.description: Sell packages to customers and manage their lifecycle: renew, freeze, adjust passes and discontinue.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Initiate online payments, confirm or refund checkouts, record received payments and invoice memberships.

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Book customers into classes and events, cancel bookings, and list a customer's upcoming and past bookings.

tags.name: Classes & Schedule
tags.description: Manage class definitions, occurrences, trainers and cancellations.

tags.name: Classes & Schedule
tags.description: List, read, create, update and cancel scheduled classes and sessions, and list the trainers who lead them.

tags.name: Attendance
tags.description: Mark attendees as no-show and list a customer's attendance history.

tags.name: Attendance
tags.description: Record attendance outcomes for booked sessions and review a customer's attendance history.

tags.name: Field Rentals
tags.description: Prepare and confirm field rental reservations, list rental categories, and manage a customer's rental history.

tags.name: Field Rentals
tags.description: Browse, prepare, confirm, and cancel field rental bookings. Also list a customer's field rental history.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Pull cash and sales summary reports for a given date range.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Financial and sales reporting endpoints for the public API.

post.description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token and refresh token (rotation). Call this before the access token expires to stay authenticated without re-using the API key.

post.summary: Exchange an API key for tokens
post.description: Exchanges a static API key for a short-lived access token and a refresh token. Use the returned accessToken as the Bearer token on all other endpoints.

get.description: Returns the full detail of a single lead by its numeric id. Use this to look up a lead's contact details, status, assignment and conversion information.

put.description: Updates an existing lead identified by id. Only the fields supplied in the body are changed. Use this to reassign, re-stage or correct a lead's details.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a lead by id so it no longer appears in the pipeline. Use this to remove leads that are invalid, duplicate or no longer relevant.

post.summary: Convert a lead to a client
post.description: Converts a lead into a customer/student, either creating a new client or linking to an existing one. Use this when a prospect signs up. The response status indicates SUCCESS, LINKED, DUPLICATE_FOUND, ALREADY_CONVERTED or ERROR.

get.description: Returns the timeline of notes and tasks recorded against a lead. Optionally filter by type (ALL, NOTE or TASK). Use this to review interactions and follow-ups for a lead.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Activity type filter: ALL (default), NOTE or TASK.

post.summary: Add an activity to a lead
post.description: Adds a note or task to a lead's timeline. Use this to record an interaction (NOTE) or schedule a follow-up (TASK, which expects a dueDate). Requires type and content.

get.description: Returns the tenant's leads, optionally filtered by name, email, phone, lead source, status, assigned staff, conversion state and a created-date range. Use this to browse or search the lead pipeline.

post.description: Creates a new sales lead in the tenant's pipeline. Use this when capturing a prospective customer from any channel. Requires name, leadSource and idLeadStatus.

get.description: Returns all lead statuses (pipeline stages) available to the tenant, including system and custom statuses. Use this to discover valid idLeadStatus values before creating or updating a lead.
Returns the shareable lead capture form links configured for the tenant. Use this to retrieve the public URLs/tokens prospects use to submit themselves as leads.

get.summary: Get the lead capture form configuration
get.description: Returns the tenant's public lead capture form configuration, including which fields are shown/required and branding. Use this to understand what data the public lead form collects.

post.description: Merges the source customer into the target customer, consolidating their history under the target. Use this to de-duplicate when the same person has two records.

parameters.name: srcId
parameters.description: Id of the source customer to merge from (will be absorbed).

parameters.name: tgtId
parameters.description: Id of the target customer to merge into.

post.summary: Add a note to a customer
post.description: Attaches a free-text note to a customer record. Use this to record interactions, follow-ups or internal remarks about a customer.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Customer id to attach the note to.

post.description: Searches the tenant's customers by name, code, email or phone number and returns the matches. Use this to find a customer when you do not know their id.

Returns a list of customers for the tenant, with optional filters. All filter fields are optional — omit them to return all customers. Set includeAllFields=true to populate extended profile fields such as company, sponsor, school, parent contacts and waiver details. Set includeNotes=true to include each customer's notes text.
Creates a customer record in the tenant's database, or updates an existing one when id is supplied. Use this when a new student or member is enrolling. Requires name and either email or phone.

get.description: Returns the customer memberships (purchased package instances) held by a customer. Use onlyActive=true to return only non-expired memberships. Use date (yyyy-MM-dd) to filter memberships valid on a specific date. Use idService to filter by service. Use type to filter by package type: CLASSES, PT, CONTRACT, REGISTRATION, DAY_PASS.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Return memberships valid on this date (yyyy-MM-dd).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type: CLASSES, PT, CONTRACT, REGISTRATION, DAY_PASS.

get.description: Returns the full profile of a single customer in the tenant. Use this to look up a customer's contact details, category and membership status by their numeric id.

post.summary: Sell a membership to a customer
post.description: Assigns a membership product to the given customer, creating the purchase and (unless suppressed) its invoice. Use this when a customer buys or is granted a new membership.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Customer id to sell the membership to.

post.description: Renews an expired customer membership, creating its next cycle. Use this to extend a customer's membership once the current term has ended.
Pauses a customer membership for a number of days starting on the given date, optionally charging a freeze fee. Use this when a customer wants to temporarily suspend their membership.
Ends a customer membership early, stopping further access and recalculating its expiry. Use this to cancel an active membership before its natural expiry date.
Adds or removes passes/sessions on a customer membership. Use a positive quantity to grant extra passes or a negative quantity to deduct them.

get.summary: Get a customer membership by id
get.description: Returns the full detail of a single customer membership, including its passes, status, dates and pricing. Use this to inspect one customer membership by its id.

post.description: Refunds the transaction of an online checkout identified by its session id. Optionally deletes the customer memberships that were created by the original purchase. Use this to reverse a paid checkout.

parameters.name: deleteCustomerMemberships
parameters.description: Also delete the customer memberships created by this purchase.

post.description: Records a payment received from a customer against their account or a specific transaction, optionally emailing a receipt. Returns the created receipt id and the customer's resulting balance.

Starts an online checkout for a package/membership using the chosen payment method, returning the result of preparing the gateway checkout. Use this to begin collecting an online payment from a customer.
Converts the proforma invoice of a customer membership into a final invoice, creating the invoice transaction. Use this to bill a customer for a membership they hold.

get.description: Finalizes a previously initiated online checkout once the payment gateway has approved it, using the checkout session id. Use this on the success callback to complete the booking/purchase.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Checkout session id returned by the payment gateway.

post.description: Cancels a customer's booking identified by idUserEvent (returned by createBooking). Set isReservation=true for field reservations. Set applyCancellation=true to enforce the tenant's cancellation policy, deducting a pass or charging a cancellation fee.

post.summary: Confirm a booking for a customer
post.description: Confirms a booking with package, credit card, or pay-later. Supports waiting list and front desk payment flows. Use this after preparing a booking to complete the reservation.

post.summary: Book a customer into a class
post.description: Books an existing customer into a class/event, paying with one of the customer's packages (memberships). Use this when a staff member enrolls a member into a session. Set asWaitingList to add them to the waiting list when the class is full.

get.description: Returns a customer's class and field bookings. Use the 'when' selector to choose upcoming (default) or past bookings. Use dateFrom and dateTo (yyyy-MM-dd) for explicit range filtering instead of the coarse upcoming/past toggle. Use this to review what a customer is scheduled for or has previously attended.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Date range start (yyyy-MM-dd). Overrides the when filter.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Date range end (yyyy-MM-dd). Overrides the when filter.

get.summary: Prepare a class booking for a customer
get.description: Prepares booking details including pricing, availability, membership options, and payment methods for a class occurrence. Use this before confirming a booking to show the customer what options are available. Supply idService to get service-specific pricing. Supply dateTime (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss) for open/recurring events where the specific slot matters.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: Slot datetime (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss). Required for open/recurring events.

get.summary: Get a class occurrence by id
get.description: Returns the full details of a single class occurrence, including capacity, attendees, trainer and location. Use this to inspect one occurrence identified by its event id.

put.description: Updates an existing class occurrence identified by its event id. Set applyToAll to propagate the change to every occurrence in the same series (a trainer is then required).

post.description: Cancels a scheduled class identified by its schedule id. Use this to remove a class from the timetable; attendees are handled per the tenant's cancellation policy. Use hideFromOnlineSchedule=true to hide the class from the public schedule without fully cancelling it. Use cancelWithAttendeesApproved=true to skip the attendee confirmation step.

parameters.name: hideFromOnlineSchedule
parameters.description: Hide from the online schedule without fully cancelling.

post.description: Cancels one specific scheduled occurrence of a class, identified by its event id. Unlike cancelClass (which targets a schedule and cancels by schedule id), this targets a single event occurrence. Set applyToAll=true to cancel this occurrence and all future occurrences in the same series. Use hideFromOnlineSchedule=true to hide without fully cancelling. Use cancelWithAttendeesApproved=true to skip the attendee confirmation step.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Class occurrence event id to cancel.

parameters.name: applyToAll
parameters.description: True to cancel this occurrence and all future ones in the series.

parameters.name: hideFromOnlineSchedule
parameters.description: Hide from the online schedule without fully cancelling.

get.description: Returns the tenant's scheduled classes and sessions, optionally filtered to a single branch. Use this to browse the timetable, see recurrence patterns and find a class id.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Restrict results to this branch id.

post.description: Creates one or more scheduled class occurrences from a title, category, trainer and one or more times. Supports recurring schedules via sessionType plus repeatUntil or occurences. Returns the details of the first created occurrence, including its id.

get.description: Returns the tenant's trainers/teachers, optionally limited to those who deliver a given service. Use this to find a trainer id when creating or updating a class.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Restrict to trainers who deliver this service id.

get.description: Returns scheduled class events for a day or week, optionally filtered by branch and categories. Use showWeekly=true to get a week's worth of events from the selectedDate. Dates must be in yyyy-MM-dd format. Use endDate to fetch an explicit range instead of a day/week toggle. Use onlyCancelled=true to return only cancelled events, or showCancelled=true to include cancelled events in normal results.

parameters.name: showWeekly
parameters.description: True to return a full week from selectedDate; false for a single day.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End of an explicit date range (yyyy-MM-dd). Overrides showWeekly.

parameters.name: onlyCancelled
parameters.description: True to return only cancelled events.

parameters.name: showCancelled
parameters.description: True to include cancelled events alongside normal results.

post.summary: Mark an attendee as a no-show
post.description: Marks the attendee booking identified by idUserEvent as a no-show, applying the tenant's no-show policy. Use this when a customer did not turn up for a session they had booked.

parameters.name: idUserEvent
parameters.description: Attendee booking id to mark as no-show.

post.description: Marks the given attendee booking as present, recording that the customer showed up and consumed their session. Use this when a customer arrives for a class or appointment they had booked.

get.description: Returns the reservations and sessions booked by the given customer along with each one's attendance outcome. Use this to review whether a customer attended, was a no-show, or cancelled their past bookings.

post.description: Cancels the field rental reservation identified by the path id. Set cancelWithCancellationFee to true to apply the tenant's cancellation fee policy.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Field rental reservation id to cancel.

post.description: Confirms a field rental reservation using the price list item id obtained from prepareFieldRental. Pay immediately with a stored credit card, or defer payment to the front desk by setting payLater=true.

get.description: Returns available field game configurations, time slots, pricing options, and payment methods for the given date and category. Use this before confirming a booking to present available options. Supply idClient to apply loyalty discounts and session-owed checks for that customer.

parameters.name: idCategory
parameters.description: Field category id to filter available fields.

parameters.name: idBranch
parameters.description: Restrict availability to this branch id.

parameters.name: idClient
parameters.description: Customer id. Supply to apply loyalty discounts.

get.description: Returns the field categories (e.g. Football, Tennis, Padel) that have at least one bookable field game with online pricing configured.
Returns the field rental reservations for the given customer. Use the 'when' selector to choose upcoming (default) or past rentals.
Returns all branches configured for the tenant.

post.description: Returns a list of sales transactions including packages, products and reservations for the tenant within the specified date range. fromDate and toDate are mandatory. Use this to review revenue and itemized sales.
Returns a list of cash transactions for the tenant within the specified date range. fromDate and toDate are mandatory. Use this to review payments, refunds and other cash movements.
Returns all available offline and online payment methods for the tenant, optionally filtered by branch. Use the returned ids to filter cash and sales reports by payment method.

leadSourceName.description: Free-text name describing the lead source.

idLeadStatus.description: Id of the lead status to assign.

lastContactDate.description: Date the lead was last contacted.

idAssignedStaff.description: Id of the staff member assigned to this lead.

howDidYouHear.description: How the lead heard about the business.

howDidYouHearOther.description: Free text used when howDidYouHear is OTHER.

notes.description: Optional note, appended as a new NOTE activity.

UpdateLeadRequest.description: Update an existing lead. All fields are optional, only supplied fields are changed.

applyToAll.description: Apply the change to all occurrences in the same series. Requires a trainer.

idFieldGame.description: Room/field-game id, or omit for an online or physical-address class.

eventDate.description: New start date and time, formatted yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

isOnline.description: Whether the class is held online.

isPublic.description: Whether the class is publicly visible.

UpdateClassRequest.description: Update an existing class occurrence. The event id is taken from the path.

OperationResponse.description: Generic result of a state-changing operation.

idBranch.description: Limit results to a specific branch id.

idPaymentMethod.description: Limit results to a specific payment method id.

idTrainer.description: Limit results to a specific trainer id.

idClient.description: Limit results to a specific customer id.

ReportRequest.description: Date range and optional filters for financial reports. fromDate and toDate are mandatory.

SalesReportItemBean.description: List of sales transactions including packages, products and reservations.

transactions.description: List of sales transactions including packages, products and reservations.

totalOthersAmount.description: Total amount from other transaction types.

SalesReportResponse.description: Sales report response containing itemized sales transactions and totals.

CashReportResponse.description: Cash report response containing a list of cash transactions.

message.description: Result message from the payment flow.

PaymentResultResponse.description: Result of a payment lifecycle operation (initiate, success, refund).

idClient.description: Id of the customer making the payment.

idPaymentMethod.description: Id of the payment method used to receive the payment.

idTransaction.description: Id of an existing receipt transaction to edit. Omit to create a new receipt.

idTenantBranch.description: Id of the tenant branch the payment belongs to. Optional.

refNumber.description: Optional reference number for the receipt.

note.description: Optional free-text note for the receipt.

transactionDate.description: Transaction date formatted yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to today when omitted.

idPaymentReminder.description: Id of a payment reminder to mark complete with this payment. Optional.

sendReceipt.description: Whether to email a receipt to the customer.

additionalProperties.description: Optional allocation of the amount across invoice/transaction ids.

allocations.description: Optional allocation of the amount across invoice/transaction ids.

ReceivePaymentRequest.description: Record a payment received from a customer against their account or a specific transaction.

receiptId.description: Id of the created/edited receipt transaction.

PaymentReceiptResponse.description: Result of recording a received payment, including the new receipt id and the customer's balance.

packageId.description: Id of the package/membership the customer is purchasing.

idPaymentMethod.description: Id of the payment method (gateway) to use for the checkout.

scheduleIds.description: Optional schedule ids to book together with the package.

items.description: Optional schedule ids to book together with the package.

InitiatePaymentRequest.description: Initiate an online payment checkout for a package/membership and a payment method.

idBranch.description: Limit results to a specific branch id.

PaymentMethodsRequest.description: Optional filters for payment methods lookup.

PaymentMethodResponse.description: A payment method with its currency details.

PaymentMethodsResponse.description: All available payment methods grouped by type.

linkToExistingClient.description: When true, link the lead to an existing client instead of creating a new one.

existingClientId.description: Id of the existing client to link to (required when linkToExistingClient is true).

forceCreateNew.description: When true, create a new client even if a duplicate is detected.

ConvertLeadRequest.description: Options controlling how a lead is converted into a client.

status.description: Conversion outcome: SUCCESS, LINKED, DUPLICATE_FOUND, ALREADY_CONVERTED or ERROR.

clientId.description: Id of the created or linked client (when status is SUCCESS or LINKED).

clientName.description: Name of the created or linked client.

duplicateClients.description: Potential duplicate clients found (when status is DUPLICATE_FOUND).

ConvertLeadResponse.description: Result of converting a lead into a client.

content.description: The text content of the note or task.

dueDate.description: Due date for the activity. Required for TASK, optional for NOTE.

CreateLeadActivityRequest.description: Add a note or task activity to a lead's timeline.

LeadActivityResponse.description: A note or task on a lead's timeline.

leadSourceName.description: Free-text name describing the lead source.

idLeadStatus.description: Id of the lead status to assign.

idAssignedStaff.description: Id of the staff member assigned to this lead.

howDidYouHear.description: How the lead heard about the business.

howDidYouHearOther.description: Free text used when howDidYouHear is OTHER.

lastContactDate.description: Date the lead was last contacted.

forceCreate.description: Force creation even when an existing client matches the email/phone.

notes.description: Optional initial note, persisted as a NOTE activity.

CreateLeadRequest.description: Create a new lead. Name, lead source and lead status are required.

idClient.description: Customer id who owns the reservation.

cancelWithCancellationFee.description: Set to true to apply the tenant's cancellation fee when within the no-refund window.

CancelFieldRentalRequest.description: Parameters for cancelling a field rental booking.

idFieldGamePriceListItem.description: Price list item id obtained from prepareFieldRental.

dateTime.description: Start date and time of the rental, formatted as yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

idCreditCard.description: Customer credit card id for card payment. Null to pay later or pay at front desk.

payLater.description: Set to true to defer payment to the front desk.

ConfirmFieldRentalRequest.description: Parameters for confirming a field rental booking.

idUserEvent.description: Id of the user event (attendance record).

idCustomerMembership.description: Id of the customer membership used.

asWaitingList.description: Whether the booking is on the waiting list.

isAction.description: Whether the note represents an actionable follow-up.

CreateCustomerNoteRequest.description: Add a note to a customer record.

idBranch.description: Branch id where the purchase is recorded.

packageId.description: Id of the package/membership product to assign to the customer.

purchaseDate.description: Purchase date, formatted yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to today when omitted.

expiryDate.description: Package expiry date, formatted yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to the product's configured duration.

originalAmount.description: Original (pre-discount) price. Defaults to the product's configured price.

discountedAmount.description: Discounted price actually charged to the customer.

passes.description: Number of passes/sessions granted. Defaults to the product's configured passes.

notes.description: Free-text notes recorded against the purchase.

withoutInvoice.description: Create the package without generating an invoice.

promotionId.description: Id of a promotion to apply to the purchase.

promoCode.description: Promo code to apply to the purchase.

refNumber.description: External reference number recorded against the purchase.

idTrainer.description: Id of the trainer to link to the package (required for PT packages).

additionalProperties.description: Payment distribution across payment method ids. Key is idPaymentMethod, value is amount.

payments.description: Payment distribution across payment method ids. Key is idPaymentMethod, value is amount.

AddCustomerPackageRequest.description: Sell/assign a package (membership) to a customer. The customer id is taken from the URL path.

CustomerMembershipResponse.description: A package/membership held by a customer.

searchText.description: Free-text search term matched against name, code, email and phone.

SearchCustomersRequest.description: Search customers by name, code, email or phone number.

cardCode.description: Filter by card / ID code (partial match).

membershipBranchId.description: Return only customers who hold a membership at this branch id.

branchId.description: Filter by the customer's assigned home branch id.

scheduleId.description: Return customers enrolled in this schedule id.

scheduleGroupId.description: Return customers enrolled in this schedule group id.

packageIds.description: Return customers holding any of these package (membership) ids.

items.description: Return customers holding any of these package (membership) ids.

instructorId.description: Return customers enrolled with this instructor id.

gender.description: Filter by gender. Accepted values: MALE, FEMALE.

hasActiveMembership.description: When true, return only customers who have a currently active membership.

hasCardIdCode.description: When true, return only customers who have a card / ID code assigned.

memberAfter.description: Return customers who became members on or after this date (yyyy-MM-dd).

memberBefore.description: Return customers who became members on or before this date (yyyy-MM-dd).

includeAllFields.description: When true, populate all available profile fields (company, sponsor, school, parent contacts, waiver date, etc.). When false or omitted, only core fields are returned.

includeNotes.description: When true, include the customer's notes text in the response.

ListCustomersRequest.description: Filters for listing customers. All fields are optional — omit to return all customers.

id.description: Customer id. Omit to create, provide to update.

email.description: Email address. Required if phoneNumber is absent (for adult customers).

phoneNumber.description: Phone number. Required if email is absent (for adult customers).

CreateCustomerRequest.description: Create or update a customer. Provide id to update an existing customer, omit it to create a new one.

invoiceId.description: Id of the created invoice transaction.

InvoiceResponse.description: Result of invoicing an item, containing the created invoice id.

idClient.description: Id of the customer that owns the package.

idFreezeType.description: Id of the configured freeze type to apply.

startDate.description: First day of the freeze, formatted yyyy-MM-dd.

totalPrice.description: Total price charged for the freeze.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes for the freeze.

changeAttendanceToSessionOwed.description: When true, existing bookings during the freeze window are moved to session-owed status.

FreezePackageRequest.description: Freeze (pause) a customer's package for a period. The package id is taken from the URL path.

quantity.description: Number of passes to add (positive) or remove (negative).

notes.description: Optional free-text reason for the adjustment.

AdjustPackageRequest.description: Adjust the number of passes/sessions on a customer's package. The package id is taken from the URL path.

idCategory.description: Category (activity) id this class belongs to.

idTenantBranch.description: Branch id where the class is held.

idFieldGame.description: Room/field-game id, or omit for an online or physical-address class.

isOnline.description: Whether the class is held online.

fromAge.description: Minimum participant age for this class.

toAge.description: Maximum participant age for this class.

times.description: One or more occurrence times. Each requires a startDate (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss) and a duration in minutes.

sessionType.description: Recurrence type. Omit for a one-off class.

repeatUntil.description: Repeat the schedule until this date (yyyy-MM-dd). Required if sessionType is set and occurences is absent.

occurences.description: Number of occurrences. Required if sessionType is set and repeatUntil is absent.

isPublic.description: Whether the class is publicly visible. Defaults to true.

attendeesVisibility.description: Whether everyone can see who is attending.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate. Used when idFieldGame is absent and the class is not online.

CreateClassRequest.description: Create one or more scheduled class occurrences. Provide at least one entry in times.

startDate.description: Start date and time, formatted yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

ClassDetailsResponse.description: Full details of a single class/event occurrence.

idClient.description: Id of the customer (client) whose booking is being cancelled.

isReservation.description: Set to true when cancelling a field/court reservation rather than a class booking.

applyCancellation.description: Set to true to apply the tenant's cancellation policy (deduct a pass or charge a fee).

CancelBookingRequest.description: Cancel a customer's booking. Identifies the customer whose booking is being cancelled and whether a cancellation fee/policy should be applied.

idClient.description: Id of the customer (client) to book.

classOccurrenceId.description: Id of the class occurrence to book the customer into.

idCustomerMembership.description: Id of the customer's purchased package to use for payment.

idCreditCard.description: Id of the credit card to use for payment. If provided, payment will be processed via card.

payLater.description: Set to true to use pay-later flow (customer will pay at a later date).

asWaitingList.description: Set to true to add the customer to the waiting list.

payOnFrontDesk.description: Set to true for front-desk payment flow.

waiverSigned.description: Set to true when the customer has signed the waiver.

termsSigned.description: Set to true when the customer has signed the terms and conditions.

scheduleIds.description: Package ids covering multiple bookings in a single confirm call.

items.description: Package ids covering multiple bookings in a single confirm call.

mandatoryMembershipIds.description: Ids of mandatory companion packages that must be purchased alongside this booking.

items.description: Ids of mandatory companion packages that must be purchased alongside this booking.

ConfirmBookingRequest.description: Request to confirm a booking for a customer. Supports payment with packages, credit cards, or pay-later flow.

idClient.description: Id of the customer (client) to book into the event.

classOccurrenceId.description: Id of the class occurrence to book the customer into.

idCustomerMembership.description: Id of the customer's purchased package to use as payment for this booking.

asWaitingList.description: Set to true to add the customer to the event's waiting list instead of a confirmed spot.

CreateBookingRequest.description: Book a customer into a class/event using one of the customer's packages (memberships). The staff member performing the booking is identified by the API key.

BookingResponse.description: The result of booking a customer into an event.

asSessionOwed.description: When true, the forfeited pass is recorded as a session owed rather than consumed.

keepMembership.description: When true, the membership/pass is not deducted on this action. Useful for comped sessions or correcting mistakes.

MarkNoShowRequest.description: Mark a booked attendee as a no-show. The attendee id is supplied in the path.

idUserEvent.description: Id of the attendee's booking (the user-has-event id) to check in.

asSessionOwed.description: When true, the consumed pass is recorded as a session owed rather than deducted immediately.

keepMembership.description: When true, the membership/pass is not deducted on this action. Useful for comped sessions or correcting mistakes.

CheckInAttendanceRequest.description: Mark a booked attendee as present (checked in) for their session.

TrainerResponse.description: A trainer/teacher who can be assigned to classes.

LeadFormLinkResponse.description: A shareable lead capture form link.

FieldConfigDto.description: Per-field visibility, requirement and rendering configuration keyed by field name.

onlineBookingId.description: Online booking identifier the public form is bound to.

linkToken.description: Opaque token used in shareable form links.

isEnabled.description: Whether the public lead form is enabled.

primaryColor.description: Primary brand colour applied to the form.

fields.description: Per-field visibility, requirement and rendering configuration keyed by field name.

LeadFormConfigResponse.description: The lead capture form configuration for the tenant.

availableSlots.description: Available time windows for this field game on the requested date.

FieldGameSummary.description: A bookable field game configuration with its available time slots.

type.description: Payment gateway type, e.g. STRIPE, CHECKOUT, CASH.

PaymentMethod.description: An online payment method accepted by the tenant.

currentDate.description: Tenant's current date, formatted as yyyy-MM-dd.

currentTime.description: Tenant's current time, formatted as HH:mm:ss.

waiver.description: Waiver text to display to the customer before booking. Null if already signed or not configured.

cancellationPolicy.description: Cancellation policy text. Null if already signed or not configured.

sessionsOverdue.description: True when the customer has unpaid sessions that exceed the tenant's maximum allowed owed count.

fieldGamesDetails.description: Available field game configurations for the requested date and filters.

priceOptions.description: Pricing options. Each entry maps a duration to a price for a specific field game.

durations.description: Set of available booking durations in minutes.

items.description: Set of available booking durations in minutes.

onlinePaymentMethods.description: Online payment methods accepted by the tenant.

PrepareFieldRentalResponse.description: Field rental booking preparation data including available time slots, pricing, and payment options.

id.description: Price list item id. Pass this as idFieldGamePriceListItem when confirming.

PriceOption.description: A pricing option for a specific field game and duration.

pictureUrl.description: Category cover image URL. Null when no image is configured.

FieldRentalCategoryResponse.description: A field rental category (e.g. Football, Tennis, Padel).

startDate.description: Start date and time, formatted yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

endDate.description: End date and time, formatted yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

trainerName.description: Name of the trainer assigned to the class. Null for field rentals.

BookingReservationResponse.description: A single booking/reservation in a customer's schedule.

idReservation.description: Reservation id, when this entry is a field reservation.

idUserEvent.description: Attendee booking id (user-has-event id) used to change attendance.

attendance.description: Attendance outcome, one of PRESENT, NO_SHOW, LATE_CANCELLATION, LATE_ARRIVAL or EMPTY. Null when not yet recorded.

AttendanceResponse.description: A single past or upcoming reservation/session for a customer, including its attendance outcome.

startDateTime.description: Start date and time, formatted yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

ClassResponse.description: A scheduled class/session in the tenant's timetable.

canUse.description: Whether it can be used for this booking.

memberships.description: List of available memberships/packages for the customer.

onlinePaymentRule.description: Online payment rule for the tenant.

removeSelectPackage.description: Whether select package option should be removed.

PrepareClassBookingResponse.description: Response for preparing a class/event booking. Contains pricing, availability, and payment options.

BearerAuth.description: Exchange your API key for a short-lived JWT via POST /api/v1/token, then pass the returned accessToken here as the Bearer token. Do not use the raw API key directly on these endpoints.
